queries.question: What experts and archival footage were used when filming 'AI Ethics & Society'?
queries.sql: SELECT name, specialty,  description, source FROM Experts JOIN Documentary ON Documentary.EXPERT_ID = Experts.id JOIN Archival_Footage ON Documentary.Archive_Footage_ID = Archival_Footage.id  WHERE title = 'AI Ethics & Society'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?specialty ?description ?source WHERE {
  ?experts a :Experts .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasExperts ?experts .
  ?archival_footage a :Archival_Footage .
  ?documentary p:hasArchival_Footage ?archival_footage .
  ?experts p:name ?name .
  ?experts p:specialty ?specialty .
  ?archival_footage p:description ?description .
  ?archival_footage p:source ?source .
  ?documentary p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "AI Ethics & Society")
}
